Shintar Vinlail  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 24th, 2007

Category: EverQuest

Level: 4
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Bones [Heretic's Bones]
Bones [Magician's Bones]

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Heretics +1
Factions Decreased:
  High Guard of Erudin -1
  High Council of Erudin -1
  Gate Callers -10

Report a correction

Post Comment
Faction info for kill
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2015 at 9:19 AM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] Shintar Vinlail says 'That was not a very intelligent thing to do.'
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] Your faction standing with Gate Callers has been adjusted by -10.
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] Your faction standing with High Guard of Erudin has been adjusted by -1.
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] Your faction standing with High Council of Erudin has been adjusted by -1.
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] Your faction standing with Heretics has been adjusted by 1.
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] You receive 1 silver from the corpse.
[Sun Aug 16 11:18:18 2015] Shintar Vinlail's corpse says 'My comrades will avenge my death.'
▲ Page top
HE IS FOR A QUEST!!!!!!!!! Its just unknown.
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2003 at 12:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248030606
135 posts
Shintar IS for a quest. Ask him (what mission), (who is Moojak), (who is Binnlin), (what prisoner), or (what heretics).

There is some kind of quest he is involved in that he describes to you. He talks of how he and two friends Moojak and Binnlin were tracking an 'escaped prisoner' thru the forest, but he got away in a boat. Shintar's two friends followed in pursuit, and he stayed behind to wait for their report.

He says 'the prisoner has left these lands' when you ask where it is... So i am guessing he is in Kerra Ridge/Isle (checked there), or somewhere else on Odus?

I havent ever heard of Binnlin or Moojak as NPC's but my guild and I are keeping our eyes open. This is NOT a new quest, as I do remember Shintar making his patrol route when i was a young newbie to Eq, back in 1999. I remember thinking 'who is this guy?' where is he going? etc...

I have tracked his movements, and he stands near the large kobold camp behind a log near a small tree with his pet (which is invis most of the time). Then after a minute or two he walks directly towards the river and stands there another minute, afterwhich he says "where are they, i can't wait around forever!", and walks back to his log.

He is a Mage, who casts a water pet (that I have seen), which goes invis or 'fades away' as soon as it appears. He is on friendly Erudin mage guild faction, I think...

I have already asked around and nobody knows what the heck i am talking about, since i came across this info simply by asking him hundreds (no joke) of random questions, and he finally responded to (what mission?).

If you find out anything else, LET ME KNOW!

-Arctura, Ranger of the Seventh Hammer.
<AMAZON STORM>
▲ Page top
RE: HE IS FOR A QUEST!!!!!!!!! Its just unknown.
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 1:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248030606

I have heard that it might be Elial Brook, or an maybe its Nomala on Kerra Isle? (the escaped catman from qeynos), maybe they are hunting him?) Ill try giving Nomala's key to him, instead of the qeynos warrior guild guy

QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2001 at 8:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually, I've looked at these bones, and they're entirely identical to the ones that the Heretics (including Elial Brook) are supposed to drop. Strange, I agree, but I expect you can turn them in to the person who takes the Heretic bones.
▲ Page top
RE: Bones (note: Not Heretic Killing Quest!)
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If this is part of a quest (it must be, but it's a mystery as to what it actually is), it is definitely not the Heretic bones quest. This is why:

1)Killing him RAISES faction with the Heretics and lowers the various Erudin factions.
2)He does not look upon us Heretics kindly, and often attacks us.

I do not know of any evidence to the contrary. If they are identical to the Heretic bones (I don't kill Heretics because I am one), they shouldn't be. So I would not turn in these bones in Erudin, because at best they you'd get a "I don't know what to do with this but thanks" message, at worst they might attack you.

I plan to do a little research into this, so I will post when I find something. But for any ambitious non-Heretics, your best bet is to leave Shintar alone and stick to the heretics and elial brook.

Aanka
7th Season ShadowKnight
Saryn Server

PS, for you non-Heretics who like killing skellies, do not kill any skeletons around Paineel called Illinar's pet or something like that. You will lower your own faction and raise it with us. In general, con people before you attack, and if they are indifferent or better named NPCs you might want to leave them alone if you don't know of any quests requiring their death.
